Valid pain IDs: 0..12  these names are not official, but here is a list of the IDs:
 1 burning,
 2 drowning,
 3 coughing,
 4 nothing,
 5 nothing,
 6 coughing_2,
 7 nothing,
 8 nothing,
 9 hurtingSick?,
 10 hurtingFall?,
 11 nothing,
 12 choking

name: _PLAY_SOUND_FROM_SCRIPTED_SPEECH
comment:
Play/advance a scripted speech created via _CREATE_NEW_SCRIPTED_PED_AMBIENT_SPEECH and return a status code.
Return values:
  0 = not ready/invalid/failed
  1 = started/playing
  2 = finished/consumed (you can drop the handle)
Typical usage: poll this in a tick after creating the speech; when it returns 2, clear your handle.
research: Joue la parole scriptee (scripted speech) specifiee.
lua:
-- 0xB18FEC133C7C6C69 · build 1207
local scriptedSpeech = 0
local result = PlaySoundFromScriptedSpeech(scriptedSpeech)
